name: Altech Corporation
summary: Altech Corporation provides technical and engineer assignment services in Japan and internationally. The company offers staffing solutions, including assignment/contracting in technical/administrative fields; welfare solutions, such as the cultivation of nursing care staff, assignment/introduction of staff to nursing care facilities, and introduction of residents to nursing care facilities; and education solutions comprising working professional/technical training for new and mid-career employees. It also provides engineering solutions/technical support services comprising engineers staffing service; contracting/outsourcing services; and contract partners/total business solutions. In addition, the company designs, manufactures, and installs plant and factory equipment; offers installation and electric wiring services for transportation systems inside clean room factories; and provides staff assignment, staff introduction, and total staffing services. Further, it provides agriculture staffing services; business solutions for nursing care; and training care person services. The company serves manufacturing companies of machinery, electricity and precision instrument, and information processing and communication businesses, as well as listed and blue-chip companies. Altech Corporation was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
